## Task
Write SPEC.md for phase CP-DT-01 (Delegate-Task Ecosystem Revamp) to:

## Prerequisites — READ ALL before writing

1. `/Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.planning/phases/CP-DT-01-delegate-task-ecosystem-revamp/CP-DT-01-CONTEXT.md`

3. `/Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.planning/phases/CP-DT-01-delegate-task-ecosystem-revamp/CP-DT-01-PATTERN.md`
4. `/Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.planning/ROADMAP.md` (lines 160-190 for CP-DT-01 scope)

## SPEC.md Structure (EARS-style requirements)

```markdown
# CP-DT-01 SPEC — Delegate-Task v2 System Specification

**Ngày:** 2026-05-18
**Giai đoạn:** CP-DT-01
**Phạm vi:** Docs/Spec ONLY (L5) — không code implementation trong giai đoạn này
**Tài liệu tiền đề:** CONTEXT.md, RESEARCH.md, PATTERN.md

## 1. Giới thiệu Hệ thống
[Brief system overview — what delegate-task v2 IS and IS NOT]

## 2. Yêu cầu Chức năng (Functional Requirements)
[Use EARS syntax: "The system SHALL..." for each requirement]
[Group by feature area, reference patterns from PATTERN.md]

### 2.1 Phân tác và Giao phó (Dispatch & Delegation)
- REQ-DT-01: The system SHALL wrap OpenCode native Task tool...
- REQ-DT-02: Category gate evaluation...
- REQ-DT-03: Concurrency control...
- REQ-DT-04: Safety ceiling enforcement...
- REQ-DT-05: Depth limiting...

### 2.2 Giám sát và Theo dõi (Monitoring & Tracking)
- REQ-MT-01: Progressive polling...
- REQ-MT-02: 4-level failure detection...
- REQ-MT-03: Dual-signal completion detection...

### 2.3 Thông báo và Giao diện (Notification & TUI)
- REQ-NT-01: TUI injection format...
- REQ-NT-02: Notification routing (10 concurrent slots)...
- REQ-NT-03: Success/failure/progress message format...

### 2.4 Điều khiển Phân tác (Delegation Control)
- REQ-DC-01: Abort operation...
- REQ-DC-02: Cancel operation...
- REQ-DC-03: Restart operation...
- REQ-DC-04: Redirect operation...

### 2.5 Tiếp tục và Xâu chuỗi (Resume & Chaining)
- REQ-RC-01: Session resume with preserved context...
- REQ-RC-02: Sequential task chaining...
- REQ-RC-03: Compact survival...

### 2.6 Tự động hóa (Auto/Loops)
- REQ-AL-01: Auto-loop integration...
- REQ-AL-02: Ralph-loop integration...

## 3. Yêu cầu Phi chức năng (Non-Functional Requirements)
- NFR-01: Maximum polling overhead on main session context
- NFR-02: Delegation record persistence guarantee
- NFR-03: Concurrent delegation limit (10 slots)
- NFR-04: Maximum delegation duration before forced termination
- NFR-05: Backward compatibility with v1 delegation records

## 4. Ràng buộc Thiết kế (Design Constraints)
- DC-01: Must use native Task tool as execution backbone (NOT promptAsync)
- DC-02: Plugin layer SHALL NOT own execution state
- DC-03: All durable state goes through task-management layer
- DC-04: Hooks are read-side only (no mutation)
- DC-05: CQRS model: tools = write-side, hooks = read-side
- DC-06: Max module size: 500 LOC
- DC-07: Total coordination sector target: ~1,600 LOC (down from ~2,969)

## 5. Giao diện Công cụ (Tool Interface)
### 5.1 delegate-task v2 Tool Schema
[Full Zod schema for the tool — agent, prompt, title, category, queueKey, safetyCeilingMs, depth, sessionId (for resume), chainFromId (for chaining)]

### 5.2 delegation-status v2 Tool Schema
[Full Zod schema for querying delegation status]

### 5.3 delegation-control Tool Schema (NEW)
[Full Zod schema for abort/cancel/restart/redirect]

## 6. Hook Yêu cầu (Hook Requirements)
[What hooks are needed for observation — session.idle, session.error, etc.]
[How hooks integrate with session-tracker]

## 7. Tiêu chuẩn Chấp nhận (Acceptance Criteria)
[For each requirement group, define measurable acceptance criteria]
[Map to PATTERN.md patterns]
[Evidence levels required: L1-L5]

## 8. Ngoài Phạm vi (Out of Scope)
- Sidecar/dashboard UI
- Cross-project delegation
- Multi-model routing
- manager.ts decomposition (recommended for implementation phase)
- Actual code implementation (this phase is L5 spec-only)

## 9. Rủi ro và Giảm thiểu (Risks & Mitigations)
| Rủi ro | Xác suất | Tác động | Giảm thiểu |
|---------|----------|----------|------------|

## 10. Phụ thuộc (Dependencies)
[List internal and external dependencies]
```

## Constraints
- Total document: 300-500 lines
- Every requirement MUST use EARS syntax: "The system SHALL..." or "The system SHALL NOT..."
- Every requirement MUST reference a pattern from PATTERN.md
- Tool schemas MUST be complete Zod pseudocode
- Acceptance criteria MUST be measurable (time thresholds, message counts, etc.)
- Include date stamp: 2026-05-18
- This is a SPEC document, not implementation — focus on WHAT not HOW

## Success Criteria
- All ROADMAP.md requirements (lines 178-190) are covered by SPEC requirements
- EARS syntax used consistently
- Tool schemas are complete (all parameters documented)
- Patterns from PATTERN.md are referenced
- Acceptance criteria are measurable
- Risks are identified with mitigations
- Document enables an implementation phase to plan concrete work

Task trước đã hoàn thành — **CP-DT-01-SPEC.md đã viết xong** với đầy đủ:
- 22 functional requirements (EARS syntax)
- 6 NFRs, 9 design constraints
- 3 tool schemas (Zod pseudocode)
- 7 risks + mitigations
- 5 blocking assumptions flagged

**Không còn next steps pending** từ task đó.
